body.title: Split web UI device list into MRU + complete alpha
body.result: /api/device/mru endpoint + channel bar split into MRU+complete sections. seedDeviceTabs fetches both in parallel. All tests green. Commit 915f34466a3f1bec12b6031b2357a3e926c4720d.
body.intention: I intend that the web UI device sidebar shows a MRU list (ordered by most-recent feed activity) above the full alpha list, so frequently active devices like Igor and Librarian stay visible without manual pinning.
body.description:
Replace the current single alpha-sorted device list in the web UI sidebar with two lists: (1) MRU — the N most recently active devices ordered by last feed post timestamp (N=5 initially); (2) Complete — full alpha list of all devices. No changes to feed rendering or feed type display yet. MRU is derived from bus.messages most-recent-per-mailbox query.

**Affected files:** web UI device list component + backend endpoint that serves the device list
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: two-list sidebar, MRU ordering by last bus message. OUT: feed type badges, importance indicators, personal/public/debug rendering distinctions.
**Completion criteria:** (1) Sidebar renders MRU section above Complete section; (2) Igor and Librarian appear in MRU when active; (3) Complete section remains full alpha list; (4) existing device list tests pass.
